trans-unit.source: We’ve made bug fixes, UI adjustments and other performance improvements to make your experience using VPN even better.
trans-unit.note: Standard text in a composer block
trans-unit.target: O vin comedât erôrs, rifinît elements de interface utent e miorât lis prestazions par rindi la tô esperience cu la VPN ancjemò plui biele.

trans-unit.source: Thank you for installing the latest version!
trans-unit.note: Standard text in a composer block
trans-unit.target: Graciis par vê instalât la version plui resinte!

trans-unit.source: You’re using the latest version of Mozilla VPN.
trans-unit.target: Tu stâs doprant la version plui resinte di Mozilla VPN.
Tu âs fat l’inzornament a Mozilla VPN 2.23
